title: Since 2017, cases of SCs denied access to public spaces on the rise with lion’s share in U.P.
description: From the latest available set of crime data in the NCRB’s 2023 Crime in India report, there were 180 reported cases of SCs being denied access to public spaces under the Prevention of Atrocities (SC/ST) Act across the country. Of these, 173 cases were reported in U.P. alone
